subject: use nssmf adapter util to fix the auth problem in DoDeallocateNSSI workflow
commit_message:
use nssmf adapter util to fix the auth problem in DoDeallocateNSSI workflow

Issue-ID: SO-2919

Change-Id: Iee938c5d72f1af1aae57f00456d16af83bf42827
Signed-off-by: hetengjiao <hetengjiao@chinamobile.com>
